Multi-result providers are wire-time diagnostics, never compile errors.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

type DB struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewDB() (*DB, error) { return &DB{}, nil }

type Pair struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewPair() (*Pair, *DB) { return nil, nil }
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: provider NewDB returns (*DB, error), which is not supported yet
  help: return the value only, or handle the error inside the provider
error: web/web.go:10:1: provider NewPair must return exactly one value
  help: example: func NewGreeter() *Greeter
